title: Lifesteal: Graves & Glory
description: Lifesteal: Graves & Glory is a PvP-focused plugin where players steal hearts on kill, and those who reach 0 hearts are banished to a custom Graveyard realm. Natural deaths don’t remove hearts, and rare artifacts grant powerful lifesteal effect
body:
🩸 Lifesteal: Graves & Glory
Lifesteal: Graves & Glory is a powerful and customizable PvP plugin where players steal hearts from others on kill, build their total health beyond the normal 20 hearts, and face banishment to a dangerous Graveyard realm if they lose all their lives.

⚔️ What it does:
Players gain permanent health (❤️) when killing others in PvP.

If a player reaches 0 hearts, they’re banished to a separate world where they must fight to revive.

Supports Artifacts that modify lifesteal behavior with unique effects (e.g. reflect, double steal, protection).

Includes PlaceholderAPI support and a fully configurable system.

Natural deaths (e.g. falling, lava) do not reduce hearts by default.

🎯 Why you should use it:
Add high-stakes PvP and long-term consequences to your server.

Perfect for Lifesteal SMPs, RPG servers, and hardcore factions.

Supports immersive roleplay through custom deaths, revivals, and artifact hunting.

Encourages survival strategy, alliance-building, and betrayal.

🧾 Critical Information:
PvP kills are the only source of heart stealing unless configured otherwise.

Players who hit 0 hearts are not banned, but instead sent to a banishment world.

Requires Paper or Spigot (1.21.4); PlaceholderAPI is optional but recommended.

Discord bot integration and Cloud Grave visuals are planned for v1.1.0.
